title: Fragment: To The Moon.
content:
Bright wanderer, fair coquette of Heaven,
    To whom alone it has been given
    To change and be adored for ever,
    Envy not this dim world, for never
    But once within its shadow grew
    One fair as -
meaning:
"Fragment: To The Moon." is a quintessential example of Percy Bysshe Shelley's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
